title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
